title: Ebbinghaus forgetting curve — facts decay exponentially unless re-accessed; pinned immune
resolution: effective_importance(importance, decay_rate, last_accessed_iso, pinned) lives in memory/salience.py: returns raw importance if pinned=1 or rate/access missing; else importance*exp(-rate*days). Per-category decay rates in CATEGORY_DECAY_RATES (permanent_profile=0.002, preferences=0.005, active_project=0.01, session_history=0.05). _init_sqlite PRAGMA-adds decay_rate + pinned columns. memory_write inserts default_decay_rate(category) at write time. _l3_fast_path and _hybrid_search_l3 incorporate effective_importance in composite mode scoring (PI_SALIENCE_MODE=composite). agent/retention.py: Policy kind extended to include 'l3_decay_archive'; _handle_l3_decay_archive added (gated by PI_DECAY_ARCHIVE=on — sets active_until=now on rows with effective_importance < 1.0; pinned rows immune; dry_run counts without writing); l3_decay_archive Policy added to DEFAULT_POLICIES (schedule=weekly). testing/test_decay.py: 11 tests. verify.py PASS.
